# double-meh

> <!-- TODO: Replace with actual project description -->
> HTTP I/O. A lightweight, zero-dependency micro-package. Works with Node.js and Bun. Supports both CommonJS and ESM consumers.

## Quick start

Install:

```bash
npm i double-meh
```

<!-- TODO: Replace with actual quick start example -->

```js
import doubleMeh from 'double-meh';
```

## Importing

<!-- TODO: Add import examples once modules are added -->

```js
// ESM (default export)
import doubleMeh from 'double-meh';

// CommonJS
const doubleMeh = require('double-meh');
```
